compute.okok: ok=1
compute.badA: err=strconv.Atoi: parsing "xx": invalid syntax
compute.badB: err=strconv.Atoi: parsing "yy": invalid syntax
compute.badC: err=strconv.Atoi: parsing "zz": invalid syntax
mix.ok: ok=10
mix.nilPtr: err=q: nil value
mix.badS: err=strconv.Atoi: parsing "xx": invalid syntax
twoWraps.okok: ok=13
twoWraps.badA: err=first: strconv.Atoi: parsing "xx": invalid syntax
twoWraps.badB: err=second: strconv.Atoi: parsing "yy": invalid syntax
shortCircuit.badFirst: err=strconv.Atoi: parsing "xx": invalid syntax
shortCircuit.callsAfterBadFirst=1
shortCircuit.okok: ok=3
shortCircuit.callsAfterOkOk=2
